strategic_objective: Clarify whether near-constant features represent stable network conditions or measurement artifacts and assess potential hidden variability at finer temporal scales.
key_checks: Compare feature value stability across time slices within the capture period
Assess class-conditioned distribution shifts for near-constant features
Evaluate feature cardinality and detect subtle fluctuations below coarse aggregation
Check for correlation between near-constant features and known network events or measurement flags
success_criteria: Evidence distinguishes stable network behavior from measurement artifact patterns
Identification of any meaningful sub-temporal variability in low-diversity features
Clear characterization of the impact of these features on class differentiation potential
